title: Siege of Cato Neimoidia
content:

|casual1=*2 Jedi''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' *Numerous [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] divisions *Numerous LAAT [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|All right. But you owe me one, and not for saving your skin for the tenth time.''"
"''''Ninth'' time. That business on Cato Neimoidia doesn't… doesn't count.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|{{Film|III}}}} The '''siege of Cato Neimoidia''' was an attempt by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to capture [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and a prominent member of the [[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Prelude== With a large Republic counterattack against the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] gains made in [[Operation Durge's Lance]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] had ordered all members of the Council to retreat to a rendezvous point in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Gunray, however, fled to the [[Purse world/Legends|purse world]], [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], with a battle group of Federation warships, intending to loot his personal citadel before it fell to the Republic onslaught. [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] obtained information as to his whereabouts, and a task force led by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was pulled from the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] and sent to wait in ambush. ==The battle== {{Quote|Send more droids against the Jedi Knight! Their bodies are making a pile so high that he will never be able to cross it!|[[Sentepeth Findos]], desperately trying to stop [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]|''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''}} A trio of [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] commanded by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] engaged the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] armada in the upper atmosphere and provided air support, while the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led their army of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in an assault on the citadel, where Gunray and the Trade Federation elite were trapped. The battle raged throughout the skies of the planet's western hemisphere, and on the peninsula upon which the viceroy's tiered stronghold—the inspiration for the command towers of the Trade Federation [[Core ship/Legends|core ships]]—was located. After an initial aerial bombardment, the main clone force attacked from the northeast shore and hammered the citadel's [[Deflector shield/Legends|energy shields]], but took heavy fire from turbolaser cannons in the lower ramparts. Generals Kenobi and Skywalker led a smaller force of clones through an orchard of [[Manax tree/Legends|Manax trees]] outside the fort, and with the help of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and the elite [[Squad Seven (Galactic Republic)|Squad Seven]], infiltrated the fungus farms located underneath the structure. From there the Jedi accessed the upper levels and began pursuing Gunray and his entourage as they tried to reach their shuttle. During the mission, some complications arose where Kenobi, having left his rebreather with Skywalker earlier, accidentally inhaled from a box of hallucinogenic spores that he unintentionally released from a container when deflecting blaster bolts from various droids, which affected his mental state. Cody then tried to contact Skywalker for assistance, initially confusing the latter because Kenobi and Cody's force was larger than his own and thus wouldn't have needed assistance until he realized he still had Obi-Wan's rebreather on him and proceeded to rush towards their location. He then noticed that Kenobi was stumbling over himself from the effects of the spores, causing Skywalker to jokingly state that Kenobi created a new lightsaber form of combat. However, at the same time, it also allowed Obi-Wan to exercise his inner potential, with Skywalker being informed that Kenobi managed to wipe out fifty droids in this state, and later saving Skywalker from Gunray's [[Mechno-chair/Legends|Mechno-chair]]. Although the Neimoidian leader managed to escape, the battle still raged on in some parts of the planet. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|What was the source of the transmission?''"
"''Deep in the Outer Rim. Six clone pilots pursued a core ship that jumped to the sector following the Battle of Cato Neimoidia. None returned.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Dyne]]|}} Although Gunray just managed to escape, Cato Neimoidia—one of the last Separatist strongholds within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]—was captured. More importantly, Republic forces captured Gunray's mechno-chair containing a message from [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], which thus linked the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] to the Confederacy, as well as the communication codes that the Separatist Council used to communicate with him and each other.{{DB|location|catoneimoidia|Cato Neimoidia}} Skywalker and Kenobi, along with their forces, were withdrawn for use in the Outer Rim to hunt down the makers of the mechno-chair in order to track down Darth Sidious, although they ended up sidetracked due to Chancellor Palpatine's [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|abduction]] by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. Obi-Wan also preferred to not count this battle as one of the times Anakin rescued him, which he reminded him after rescuing the Chancellor. Despite the Republic victory on Cato Neimoidia, the Separatist forces were not defeated and they continued to fight off the Republic troops. Jedi Masters [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] and [[Ferroda]] were later sent to the planet to coordinate [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|mopping-up operations]] against continued resistance, and were killed during [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. ==Appearances== [[File:Carrierbattle.jpg|thumb|right|Concept art of the battle]] *''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}} *{{Film|III}} {{Mo}} *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' junior novelization]] {{Mo}} *[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{1stID|siege of Cato Neimoidia}} *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Saga Collection|pack=#057: Clone Trooper (442nd Siege Battalion)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/tsc057clone442.asp}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' *{{InsiderCite|100|The 100 Greatest Things About Star Wars... Ever!|The 100 Greatest Things About ''Star Wars''... Ever!}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 8|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 8]] *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 23|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 23]] *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 32|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 32]] *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 33|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 33]] *{{SideshowCite|set=Militaries of Star Wars|packtype=Sixth Scale Figure|pack=Commander Cody (212th Attack Battalion)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/SSC-Cody.asp}} *{{DB|location|catoneimoidia|Cato Neimoidia}} *{{DB|character|commandercody|Cody, Clone Commander}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Cato Neimoidia/Leyendas }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Cato Neimoidia (Nute Gunray), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Cato Neimoidia]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
